text.title: pnpm Package Management Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the pnpm-package-management methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-current-state
step.action: Check for package-lock.json, yarn.lock, .npmrc settings, current packageManager field. Record findings.
step.output: Audit report (what to remove, what to add)

step.name: pin-package-manager
step.action: Add "packageManager": "pnpm@x.y.z" to root package.json. Run corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@x.y.z --activate.

step.name: emit-npmrc
step.action: Write .npmrc with strict-peer-dependencies=true, auto-install-peers=true, prefer-frozen-lockfile=true, engine-strict=true. Leave shamefully-hoist unset (default false).

step.name: block-other-managers
step.action: Add "preinstall": "npx -y only-allow pnpm" to scripts. Delete package-lock.json and yarn.lock if present.
step.output: Updated root package.json + clean lockfile state

step.name: wire-ci
step.action: Use pnpm/action-setup@v4 with version matching packageManager. Run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile. Cache the pnpm store separately.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run scripts/validate-pnpm-package-management.py against the metadata; fix any violations before committing.
step.decision-gate: If validator returns non-zero, halt and fix.
